/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/streamOrderedAllocationIPC.dir/streamOrderedAllocationIPC.cu.o "CMakeFiles/streamOrderedAllocationIPC.dir/home/cc/power/GPGPU/script/run_benchmark/build-sm80-source/Common/helper_multiprocess.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/streamOrderedAllocationIPC.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o streamOrderedAllocationIPC   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  /usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
